subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-11
subcodes.first_line: The greatest attainment in the world of humanity is love, for it is through love that man is attracted toward God. It is love that establishes communication
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @spiritual transformation, @power of love, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love and unity
